title: Versioning, Delete Markers, Object Lock, and Recovery · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible version and immutable-retention recovery runbook with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in version and immutable-retention recovery runbook and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Distinguish unversioned, enabled, and suspended versioning and test null versions, overwrite behavior, and lifecycle impact.
List versions and delete markers, resolve current reads, restore by removing a marker or copying a version, and preserve audit identity.
Apply governance, compliance, legal hold, retention date, and authorized bypass by version with irreversible-risk review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Versioning State Transition
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 3528 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate version identity, immutable retention meaning, and executed restore evidence; retain stable tenant and file identity without exposing it in metric labels; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish unversioned, enabled, and suspended versioning and test null versions, overwrite behavior, and lifecycle impact.

Inspect the Versioning State Transition trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Versioning State Transition.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish unversioned, enabled, and suspended versioning and test null versions, overwrite behavior, and lifecycle impact. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Versioning State Transition, keep Versioning State Transition connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.
